heroHeadline: PLA Drops to 2 Sorties Apr 3 After 11 on Apr 1; KMT Chair Visit Itinerary Set — Sun Yat-sen Mausoleum Apr 8, Xi Meeting in Beijing
heroSubtitle: PLA oscillates: 19 sorties (Mar 29 peak) → 1 → 1 → 11 (Apr 1) → 2 (Apr 3, SW+E ADIZ); PLA warship warned US P-8 near Hengchun Peninsula Apr 3; KMT Chairwoman Cheng Li-wun departs for China Apr 7 (Shanghai→Nanjing→Beijing); Sun Yat-sen mausoleum Apr 8 visit signals Beijing's unification narrative; Taiwan security: visit creates 'illusion of unification' for Trump; 41 days to Trump-Xi Beijing summit (May 14-15)
footerNote: Data sourced from Taiwan MND, US DoD, DSCA, CSIS ChinaPower, Global Taiwan Institute, AIT, Reuters, AP, Bloomberg, NPR, Taipei Times, Focus Taiwan, Nikkei Asia, Japan Times, ANI News, Vision Times, South China Morning Post, and institutional analyses. All claims reflect multi-pole sourcing across Western, East Asian, and international media.
